description: Style NoteWith this performance enabled T-shirt, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. With a superior performance fabric which keeps cool air flowing in and heat and sweat flowing out, you can stay dry and comfortable, performing at your peak in even the most heated competition. On a day off, pair it with denims and cool sneakers to look your casual best.Product DetailsBlack crew neck T-shirt, has short sleeves, engineered with climalite technology and branding on the left chestMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeCool iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
